title: Window Sill Yellow House Fashion Editorial AI
sourceTitle: Window Sill Yellow House Fashion Editorial AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-photoreal warm fashion editorial of an adult woman in an open window of a soft yellow house, built around clean sunlight, flowers, headphones, and relaxed confidence. Subject: The adult fashion subject wears white satin midi slip dress with thin straps and fluid fabric, simple white flats or minimal shoes, clean over-ear headphones, and holds loose bouquet of fresh yellow flowers with calm relaxed confidence. Scene: Soft warm yellow house facade with a simple rectangular open window, white interior walls, clean uncluttered architecture, and a sunlit residential fashion-editorial atmosphere. Composition: 4:5 centered full-body framing within the window frame; one leg extended outward and raised on the sill, other leg relaxed inside, one arm hanging freely; the window acts as the graphic frame while the facade and interior stay clean and readable. Signature Elements: Preserved window sill yellow house fashion editorial source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Ultra-photoreal fashion editorial with warm architectural minimalism, clean styling, realistic fabric flow, polished skin and hair detail, and high-resolution editorial render finish. Color Palette: Warm yellows, clean whites, natural skin tones, pale flower yellows, soft facade shadows, and restrained summer neutrals. Lighting: Midday direct natural sunlight with crisp shadows on the facade, bright clean highlights on satin or cotton fabric, and realistic depth inside the window. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
